## Description

Provide a brief summary of the changes made, describing the issues fixed or new features introduced.

## Related Issues

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines.
- [ ] I have ran automated tests and they pass successfully.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce compilation or syntax warnings.
- [ ] I have updated the walkthrough and task artifacts if relevant.
